top.title: 'He liked the fear in our eyes', Epstein survivors tell BBC
top.summary: In an interview with BBC Newsnight, five women abused by the disgraced financier describe the impact of their shared ordeal.

top.title: Tough negotiations loom as Denmark's Social Democrats fail to secure a majority
top.summary: The party, which has governed since 2019, gained the most votes but saw its weakest results in over a century.

top.title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
top.summary: The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

top.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
top.summary: The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.

top.title: OpenAI ends Disney partnership as it closes Sora video-making app
top.summary: The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.
